problems.cause: tempin1 is not visible in the temp_control component type scope; it is a port of voter, not temp_control
problems.minimal_edit: remove the entire annex block under owner temp_control

problems.cause: voter.tempin1 is not a valid identifier in the voter component type annex; tempin1 is a port of voter and must be referenced without qualification
problems.minimal_edit: replace 'voter.tempin1' with 'tempin1' in all expressions in voter's annex

executor_steps: Delete the annex block under owner temp_control (lines 55-60) because temp_control is not the component type defining tempin1/tempin2 and those ports are not visible there
In the voter component type annex (lines 83-88), replace all occurrences of 'voter.tempin1' with 'tempin1' and 'voter.tempin2' with 'tempin2' to use only visible port identifiers
